style_authority.note: Separates adaptive product semantics from platform-native navigation, controls, typography, materials, motion, and layout.

reference_selection.note: Applies product context, iOS, Android, adaptive layout, accessibility, interaction, motion, and runtime-validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Repairs native trust and task flow without identical visual skins, Web-shaped controls, or decorative redesign.

evidence_level.note: Labels the review L0 static and denies source, build, simulator, emulator, hardware, accessibility-tree, and performance proof.

verified_boundary.note: Separates supplied implementation facts from unverified targets, gestures, persistence, runtime behavior, haptics, and devices.

design_moves.note: Covers native navigation, adaptive structures, target sizes, scalable type, native controls, semantic themes, accessible motion, recovery, and parity.

scope_control.note: Stays read-only, prioritized, platform-conformance focused, and within the explicit 150-line response budget.
